babyDevelopment: The skeleton is transforming from rubbery cartilage to solid bone. The umbilical cord is growing stronger and thicker. The baby is practicing sucking and swallowing.
bodyChanges: Your center of gravity is shifting. You may have increased appetite and cravings. Sweating may increase due to higher metabolism and blood volume.
tips: Buy comfortable, flat shoes with good arch support
Drink tons of water to avoid constipation

dont: Stand in one place for too long

travelAdvisory.note: Still a great time to travel. Remember to stretch your legs on flights.

warningSignsToWatch: Sudden swelling of face and hands
milestoneDescription: The skeletal structure is fully forming into solid bone.
